assertions.reason: `/business/projects/new` showed grouped sections (Project Basics, Scope & Requirements, Compensation & Timeline, Location) with helper/instructional text near inputs.
Business and student portals both exposed clear sidebar navigation with key destinations (dashboard, projects/opportunities, resources, profile).
Landing page presented distinct student and business-owner entry CTAs/pathways.
First-time dashboards displayed onboarding guidance panels ('How the G1000 Portal works' with step-by-step instructions) for both business and student users.

Business E2E flow completed: registration succeeded, login redirected to dashboard, opportunity form submitted, and new opportunity appeared on dashboard. Relevant network calls observed include POST /api/auth/business/login and GET /api/business/projects; no console errors were reported.

Student E2E flow completed: registration succeeded, login reached student dashboard, opportunities list loaded, and opportunity detail page content loaded. Relevant network calls observed include POST /api/auth/register/student, POST /api/auth/student/login, GET /api/opportunities, and GET /api/opportunities/{id}; no console errors were reported.

frictions: Immediately after some navigation/actions, `agent-browser get url` briefly returned the previous route; a follow-up URL/text check confirmed final page state.
`agent-browser network requests` lists request methods/URLs but not HTTP status codes, so endpoint success was inferred from successful flow transitions and rendered UI states.
